title: Full mirroring of items through connected boards (both ways)

posts.author: Weleynator (William Rousseau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have created 2 boards. My first board is for the management team. The second one is for a specific employee who’s a direct report of mine. I want to create tasks in my first board and when I assign a tasks to my employee, this will appear in his board.

I would like to be able to have a both way mirroring in the sense that all that is contained in an item such as subitems, statuses, notes, description etc, will be reflected in the first board when the employee updates anything on his board. I would also like things to work both ways, as I would like him to be able to crate tasks directly in his board and having those tasks appear in our first board.

Thank you very much for your help.

William
